/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_stitcher.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_stitcher.dir/test_stitcher_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_stitcher.dir/tests/test_stitcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_stitcher.dir/src/Stitcher.cpp.o -o test_stitcher  /usr/lib/libQt6Test.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0
